name: micky-psych-tools
description: Personal Claude Code plugins for clinical psychiatry, evidence appraisal, and pre-build alignment.

plugins.name: pubmed-research-note
plugins.description: Answers a clinical decision from primary literature. Verdict-first, quantified, trial-registry-checked evidence reports; vault notes only on request.

plugins.name: intent-lock
plugins.description: Interrogate a request until it has exactly one reading, then build it. Uncapped rounds, a compounding misread ledger, silent convergence gates.
